case_title: JUSTIN KRAN VS. BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LIZA MORATTO, ASST. PROPERTY MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2022 - CONTINUED THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO NOV-08-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JUSTIN KRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DOUGLAS R. LEVENTON, REGIONAL DIRECTOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DOUG LEVENTON, REGIONAL DIRECTOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,130.56 FILED BY KRAN, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$262.53); FOR HEARING ON 10-17-22; DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE AT HEARING SERVED SEP-08-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. FILED BY KRAN, JUSTIN BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CARMELO HENRIQUEZ, PROPERTY MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JUSTIN KRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DOUGLAS R. LEVENTON (REGIONAL DIRECTOR), CAMELO HENRIQUEZ (PROPERTY MANAGER) AND LIZA MORATTO (ASSISTANT PROPERTY MANAGER). PARTIES AGREED TO SETTLEMENT TERMS PROPOSED BY DEFENDANT PLUS PAINTING OF THE UNIT UNDER REASONABLE CONDITIONS TO BE SET BY DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT AGREES TO GET PAINTING DONE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DOUGLAS R. LEVENTON, REGIONAL DIRECTOR. FILED BY DEFENDANT BPREP MOSSO APARTMENTS LLC
